title: YOUTH HOUSE - 211info
text: CORVALLIS YOUTH HOUSE AND GARDENS YOUTH HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides GED test preperation and assistance with GED test fees. Also provides a paid work experiance opptunity. Work experiance pays minimum wage (examples of work experiance include community garden, MakerSpace, city library, maintenance or local business) 536 2nd Street SW Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Varies by program with a focus on youth ages 16-24. Hours: No standard hours (541) 758-2605 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 758-2605 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more infomation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, photo ID, birth certificate, school transcript AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS YOUTH HOUSE AND GARDENS
